political.s: Via parent company Kroger: FEC: $18K PAC donations; 83% to Republican, 17% to Democratic committees.

labor.s: Via parent company Kroger: 320 federal penalties totaling $3.3B since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

charity.s: Via parent company Kroger: $240M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.16% of revenue) via Kroger Co. Foundation. Operates the Kroger Co Foundation: $6.9M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2024, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company Kroger: air pollution violation: $102.8M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

animals.s: Via parent company Kroger: Open Wing Alliance: At risk — Simple Truth cage-free milestone partially reported. [Cage-free at risk]

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

execPay.s: Via parent company Kroger: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 417:1 (median employee pay $106) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Fred Meyer Jewelers is an American chain of jewelry stores. It is owned by Fred Meyer, which is a subsidiary of Kroger. The company also formerly operated under the name Littman Jewelers.

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by Kroger; HQ Portland. (Wikidata Q5495935)

health.s: Via parent company Kroger: 6 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the recalled over-the-counter product contains the regulated substance acetamino.
